fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: MongoDB shows strong revenue growth and free cash flow, but operates with negative profit margins and a high forward P/E ratio.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY indicates strong market adoption.
Free cash flow of $463.32M TTM demonstrates operational cash generation.
Gross margin of 71.7% is healthy, suggesting efficient core operations.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $358.82, indicating positive sentiment.
negatives: Profit margin of -2.9% and operating margin of 0.0% indicate unprofitability.
Forward P/E of 43.43 is high, suggesting aggressive growth expectations are priced in.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.13 is elevated, indicating significant leverage.
Quarterly earnings growth of -1.9% suggests recent deceleration.

news.paragraph: MongoDB's Instruqt platform is being used by Google Cloud Security to train practitioners on Agentic AI, as highlighted at Google Next 2026. This follows recent analyst optimism and a significant one-year rally, with the company's valuation being reassessed in light of AI momentum. With next earnings on May 28th, the market will be looking for continued strong growth and profitability to justify the current share price.
